scripts.install-launchd: cp ../sync/com.iselodyhereyet.sync.plist ~/Library/LaunchAgents/ && launchctl load ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.iselodyhereyet.sync.plist && echo 'Launchd job installed and loaded.'
scripts.uninstall-launchd: launchctl unload ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.iselodyhereyet.sync.plist && rm ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.iselodyhereyet.sync.plist && echo 'Launchd job unloaded and removed.'
